3154330.name: Bermuda
3154330.description:
Welcome to Bermuda — where the sea is strange and the sailors stranger

Take command of your ragtag crew and navigate a mysterious patch of ocean where physics bend, time twists, and nothing stays the same. Bermuda is a pause-based strategy game with roguelite elements, crew management, and physics-driven combat — all set against a backdrop of modern pirate warfare in a surreal, cartoonish world.

Control your ship from a bird's-eye view and issue precise orders to your sailors during pauses. Each crew member has their own stats, gear, and personality. Some fire fast, some shoot straight — all are up to you to command.

In the ever-shifting Bermuda Triangle, visibility is limited and danger comes from everywhere — rival pirate factions, supernatural events, strange anomalies, and the sea itself. Your only hope: adapt, scavenge, and survive long enough to reach your next upgrade.
3154330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
